summary: Executed backend pytest regression suite and frontend Playwright e2e against public preview URL. Core MVP and strategy pack flows are working end-to-end, including invite-only auth, protected navigation, events, memories, threads, members invites, and Stripe checkout initiation.

integration_issues.issue: Checkout session creation and redirect work, but full external payment completion/webhook verification was not executed in this run.

action_items: Optional hardening: split /app/backend/server.py into modular routers/services (file is ~900 lines and exceeds maintainability guideline).
Optionally add automated webhook simulation test for Stripe paid status transition.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py is oversized (>700 lines), increasing regression risk and lowering maintainability; split by domain (auth/events/memories/threads/payments).
seed_data_creation: Created TEST/UI seed entities via real APIs: one host community, one invited member, event, memory, thread, and initiated payment transaction.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL used: https://kindred-gather.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend pytest: 8/8 passed. UI e2e passed all requested flows; Stripe redirect reached checkout.stripe.com, but payment submit/webhook completion not performed.
rca of the issue: No blocking defects reproduced. Only remaining gap is external payment completion scope, which was intentionally not finalized in browser automation.
